MOORE
SOME EXPERTS SPECULATE THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL CEASE TO HOLD TRUE AROUND 2025 TO 2030 DUE TO PHYSICAL LIMITATIONS IN TRANSISTOR SHRINKING AND HEAT DISSIPATION ISSUES.
***
OTHER ANALYSTS ARGUE THAT THE LAW WILL NOT STOP BUT RATHER EVOLVE AS THE INDUSTRY PIVOTS TO NEW ARCHITECTURES LIKE THREE-DIMENSIONAL STACKING AND ADVANCED PACKAGING TO SUSTAIN PERFORMANCE GROWTH.
